public_practice_name: Dr. Fieldhouse & Dr. Peterson (La Grange Park Dentistry)
owner_operator_stated: Site is branded 'Dr. Fieldhouse & Dr. Peterson', matching the record's named provider (Fieldhouse) as a practice owner/operator.
notes: Small independent general practice (2 dentists), no DSO/group affiliation found. No careers/hiring page located.

public_practice_name: Webster Dental Care of La Grange Park
notes: Part of Webster Dental Management / Webster Dental Care, an 8-10 location Chicago-area DSO-style group (HQ Edison Park) — not an independent solo practice. Vendor hint (care.advocatehealth.com) was WRONG and unrelated (Advocate Health is a hospital system); actual corroborated site is webdentalchicago.com, confirmed by exact address+phone match. A Registered Dental Hygienist opening specifically for this La Grange Park location was found in the job board results (source_url above). Specific on-site dentist roster for THIS location was not confirmed (site referenced a separate 'Meet our La Grange Park doctors' subpage not fetched); provider_count_website left at 0 to avoid fabricating names.

owner_operator_stated: Practice is stated as led by Dr. Cristian Löfvall, DDS; serving the community for over 40 years.
notes: Independent multi-dentist general practice (4 doctors), no indication of DSO/multi-location group affiliation. No careers page found; /careers/ returned 404.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Michael Gonda is confirmed as a practicing/owning dentist at Prairie Walk Dental, matching the record entity (Michael J Gonda DDS Ltd). He practices alongside at least one associate, but sources conflict on that associate's name (Dr. Tooba Ajmal per some listings vs Dr. Michael Moore per others), so no second name is claimed with confidence.
notes: Direct WebFetch of prairiewalkdental.com (/contact, /about, /doctors) was blocked with HTTP 403 (bot protection); corroboration is via exact phone-number match (630-968-5078) confirmed across multiple independent search-indexed listings (Yelp, Lisle Area Chamber of Commerce, BBB). Third-party address listings show 4751 Main St Ste 2A vs the record's 4745 Main St — a discrepancy beyond a simple formatting variant, so corroboration here rests on the phone match, not the address. Not part of a DSO/multi-location group. No careers page found within budget.

owner_operator_stated: Two entities: (1) the record's named entity, James L. Derrico DDS PC (aka historically 'College Square Dental'), previously operated at 6448 College Rd, Lisle, IL with phone (630) 548-1324 per third-party listings (WebMD, Yellow Pages); (2) the CURRENT operator at that exact address is Brammeier Family Dental of Lisle, led by Dr. Lauren Brammeier, phone (630) 983-8700 — a different, currently-active phone number. A search-indexed subpage of the current site (lisleildentist.com/meet-the-doctor/) states Dr. Brammeier's philosophy 'mirrors' Dr. Derrico's and that she is 'committed to continuing his legacy through superior dentistry and exceptional care,' indicating a practice-succession/handoff at this address rather than Derrico still being the operator.
notes: SUCCESSOR CASE: street address matches exactly (6448 College Rd, Lisle, IL 60532), but the practice currently operating there is Brammeier Family Dental (formerly also 'College Square Dental'), not the record's named entity James L Derrico DDS, and the current phone number (630) 983-8700 does not match the record's (630) 548-1324. Independent solo-to-solo succession, not a DSO.

owner_operator_stated: Appears to be a Liu family-owned practice: Dr. Jasmine Liu (matches the record's named provider, general/pediatric, also a UIC clinical instructor), Dr. Tony Liu (general/cosmetic), and Dr. Laura Liu (orthodontist), all sharing the practice's family branding.
notes: Independent family-owned general/cosmetic/orthodontic practice; address (3060 Ogden Ave Ste 300) and phone (630-357-0002) both match the record exactly. No careers/hiring page found within search budget.
